datasets.name: w1a_nation_profile
queryLines:
SELECT CASE sort_order WHEN 10 THEN '🏳 Identity' WHEN 11 THEN '🏳 Identity' WHEN 12 THEN '🏳 Identity' WHEN 20 THEN '📊 Overview' WHEN 21 THEN '📊 Overview' WHEN 22 THEN '📊 Overview' WHEN 40 THEN '🎲 Top Five Races' WHEN 41 THEN '🎲 Top Five Races' WHEN 42 THEN '🎲 Top Five Races' WHEN 43 THEN '🎲 Top Five Races' WHEN 44 THEN '🎲 Top Five Races' WHEN 45 THEN '🎲 Top Five Races' WHEN 46 THEN '🎲 Top Five Races' WHEN 50 THEN '🌍 International Play' WHEN 51 THEN '🌍 International Play' WHEN 52 THEN '🌍 International Play' WHEN 53 THEN '🌍 International Play' WHEN 80 THEN '⚔ Top 3 Rivals' WHEN 81 THEN '⚔ Top 3 Rivals' WHEN 82 THEN '⚔ Top 3 Rivals' WHEN 83 THEN '⚔ Top 3 Rivals' ELSE label END as label, profile, sort_order, nation_id, nation_name_display, load_timestamp
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_profile_long
WHERE sort_order BETWEEN 10 AND 12
   OR sort_order BETWEEN 20 AND 22
   OR sort_order BETWEEN 40 AND 46
   OR sort_order BETWEEN 50 AND 53
   OR sort_order BETWEEN 80 AND 83
ORDER BY sort_order

datasets.name: w1b_performance
queryLines:
SELECT CASE sort_order WHEN 23 THEN '💪 Performance & Strength' WHEN 30 THEN '📈 Ratings (GLO)' WHEN 31 THEN '📈 Ratings (GLO)' WHEN 32 THEN '📈 Ratings (GLO)' WHEN 33 THEN '📈 Ratings (GLO)' WHEN 34 THEN '📈 Ratings (GLO)' WHEN 35 THEN '📈 Ratings (GLO)' WHEN 36 THEN '📈 Ratings (GLO)' WHEN 60 THEN '🏆 National Team Strength' WHEN 61 THEN '🏆 National Team Strength' WHEN 62 THEN '🏆 National Team Strength' WHEN 63 THEN '🏆 National Team Strength' WHEN 64 THEN '🏆 National Team Strength' WHEN 70 THEN '⚡ Head-to-Head' WHEN 71 THEN '⚡ Head-to-Head' WHEN 72 THEN '⚡ Head-to-Head' WHEN 73 THEN '⚡ Head-to-Head' ELSE label END as label, profile, sort_order, nation_id, nation_name_display, load_timestamp
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_profile_long
WHERE sort_order = 23
   OR sort_order BETWEEN 30 AND 36
   OR sort_order BETWEEN 60 AND 64
   OR sort_order BETWEEN 70 AND 73
ORDER BY sort_order

datasets.name: w2_nation_members_over_time
queryLines:
SELECT
  iso_week,
  cumulative_coaches,
  nation_name_display
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_members_cumulative_weekly_display
WHERE nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
  OR nation_id IN (
    SELECT opponent_nation_id
    FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_rivalry_display
    WHERE nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
    ORDER BY rivalry_score ASC
    LIMIT 3
  )
ORDER BY iso_week, nation_name_display

datasets.name: w3_glo_boxplot
queryLines:
SELECT
  nation_name_display,
  metric_type,
  metric_value
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_coach_glo_metrics_long
WHERE metric_type = :glo_metric
  AND (
    nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
    OR nation_id IN (
      SELECT opponent_nation_id
      FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_rivalry_display
      WHERE nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
      ORDER BY rivalry_score ASC
      LIMIT 3
    )
    OR nation_name_display = 'World'
  )
ORDER BY nation_name_display

datasets.name: w5_glo_histogram
queryLines:
SELECT
  glo_bin,
  glo_bin_label,
  density_pct,
  nation_name_display
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_glo_binned_distribution_display
WHERE metric_type = :glo_metric
  AND (
    nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
    OR nation_id IN (
      SELECT opponent_nation_id
      FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_rivalry_display
      WHERE nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
      ORDER BY rivalry_score ASC
      LIMIT 3
    )
    OR nation_id = 0
  )
ORDER BY glo_bin, nation_name_display

datasets.name: w6_glo_cumulative
queryLines:
SELECT
  glo_value,
  cumulative_pct,
  nation_name_display
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_glo_smooth_cdf_display
WHERE metric_type = :glo_metric
  AND (
    nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
    OR nation_id IN (
      SELECT opponent_nation_id
      FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_rivalry_display
      WHERE nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
      ORDER BY rivalry_score ASC
      LIMIT 3
    )
    OR nation_id = 0
  )
ORDER BY glo_value, nation_name_display

datasets.name: w7_race_popularity
queryLines:
SELECT
  race_name,
  coaches_pct_nation,
  coach_participations_pct_nation,
  nation_name_display
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_race_meta
WHERE (nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
  OR nation_id IN (
    SELECT opponent_nation_id
    FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_rivalry_display
    WHERE nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
    ORDER BY rivalry_score ASC
    LIMIT 3
  )
  OR nation_name_display = 'World')
  AND (SIZE(coalesce(:race_name, array())) = 0 OR array_contains(:race_name, race_name))
ORDER BY race_name

datasets.name: w9_opponent_elo_bins
queryLines:
SELECT
  bin_label,
  bin_index,
  games,
  wins,
  draws,
  losses,
  ppg,
  nation_name_display
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_opponent_elo_bin_wdl_display
WHERE metric_type = :glo_metric
  AND nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
ORDER BY bin_index

datasets.name: w11_glo_exchange
queryLines:
SELECT
  opponent_nation_name_display,
  avg_glo_exchange,
  total_glo_exchange
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_glo_exchange_display
WHERE nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
ORDER BY total_glo_exchange DESC

datasets.name: w12_nation_rivalries
queryLines:
SELECT
  opponent_nation_name_display,
  games,
  wins,
  draws,
  losses,
  CONCAT(CAST(games AS STRING), '(', CAST(wins AS STRING), '/', CAST(draws AS STRING), '/', CAST(losses AS STRING), ')') AS games_wdl,
  ppg,
  avg_glo_exchange,
  opp_selector_score_global,
  rivalry_score
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_rivalry_display
WHERE nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
ORDER BY rivalry_score ASC

datasets.name: w13_team_candidates
queryLines:
SELECT
  selector_rank_national,
  coach_name,
  selector_score_national,
  glo_rank_global,
  race_rank_global,
  opponent_rank_global,
  selector_score_global,
  selector_rank_global,
  glo_peak,
  glo_median,
  race_elo_median,
  avg_opponent_glo,
  form_score,
  races_above_world_median,
  world_specialist_count,
  national_specialist_count
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_team_candidates_display
WHERE nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
  AND selector_focus = :selector_focus
ORDER BY selector_rank_global ASC

datasets.name: w14_power_ranking
queryLines:
SELECT
  power_rank,
  flag_emoji,
  nation_name_display,
  top_8_avg_selector_score_national,
  top_8_avg_selector_score_global,
  top_8_avg_glo_peak,
  top_8_avg_glo_median,
  coaches_in_top_8,
  coaches_eligible
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_power_ranking_display
WHERE selector_focus = :selector_focus
  AND coaches_eligible >= 8
ORDER BY power_rank

datasets.name: filter_glo_metric_values
queryLines:
SELECT DISTINCT metric_type
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_glo_binned_distribution_display
ORDER BY metric_type

datasets.name: filter_race_values
queryLines:
SELECT DISTINCT race_name
FROM naf_catalog.gold_dim.race_dim
WHERE race_name IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY race_name

datasets.name: w7b_race_participations
queryLines:
SELECT
  race_name,
  coach_participations_pct_nation,
  nation_name_display
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_race_meta
WHERE (nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
  OR nation_id IN (
    SELECT opponent_nation_id
    FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_rivalry_display
    WHERE nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
    ORDER BY rivalry_score ASC
    LIMIT 3
  )
  OR nation_name_display = 'World')
  AND (SIZE(coalesce(:race_name, array())) = 0 OR array_contains(:race_name, race_name))
ORDER BY race_name

datasets.name: filter_selector_focus_values
queryLines:
SELECT DISTINCT selector_focus
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_team_candidates_display
ORDER BY selector_focus

datasets.name: 7c4abac8
datasets.displayName: Global Nation Peak Density Aggregated Values
queryLines:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM naf_catalog.gold_summary.nation_coach_glo_metrics 
WHERE nation_id = 0 AND is_valid_glo = TRUE

frame.title: GLO Distribution
frame.description: Distribution of MEDIAN global ELO ratings

frame.title: GLO Cumulative Distribution
frame.description: Cumulative distribution of global ELO ratings by nation compared to the world

frame.title: Race Coverage
frame.description: Proportion of coaching that have played any race

frame.title: Results by Opponent Rating
frame.description: Loss, Draw, Win record versus opponents sorted in bins based on MEDIAN global ELO

frame.title: GLO Exchange vs Other Nations
frame.description: Total global rating exchange (hight) and average global rating exchange per game (colour) against other nations

frame.title: Top 10 Rivalries
frame.description: Top rivals based on equal weighting by rank of number of games and closeness of games (point per game close to 0.5)

frame.title: National Team Candidates
frame.description: National ranking of players by Global Selector Score. Selector Score is an equal weighting of MEDIAN GLO, MEDIAN ELO and MEDIAN opponent GLO career
